channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Carol Banawa mourns the passing of her mother after cancer battle
item.description: Filipino singer and actress Carol Banawa is grieving the loss of her mother, Cirila Banawa, who passed away after a courageous battle with cancer. The family confirmed the sad news on May 18, 2026. Ca...

item.title: Yellow Heat Warning Issued for the Greater Toronto and Hamilton Area
item.description: Residents of the Greater Toronto and Hamilton Area (GTHA) are being advised to prepare for the first significant heat event of the season. Meteorologists have issued a yellow heat warning, signalling ...

item.title: Met Police investigate allegations of officers sleeping while on duty at Windsor Castle
item.description: The Metropolitan Police are conducting an urgent inquiry into allegations that some officers assigned to protect the Royal Family at Windsor Castle fell asleep while on duty. The claims, first reporte...

item.title: SCOPA seeks detailed reports from eThekwini Municipality on governance and expenditure concerns
item.description: Parliament's Standing Committee on Public Accounts (SCOPA) has intensified scrutiny on the eThekwini Municipality, requesting detailed reports on multiple governance and financial concerns ahead of a ...

item.title: Seal pup rescued by postman successfully released back into the sea
item.description: A baby grey seal, affectionately named 'Cold Call', was discovered by postman Glen Palmer on 2 January outside a residence in Gorleston, Norfolk, having previously been seen attempting to hide under a...

item.title: U.S. and China Reach $17 Billion Annual Agricultural Trade Agreement Through 2028
item.description: During a recent summit in Beijing, the United States and China announced that China will commit to purchasing at least US$17 billion in U.S. agricultural products annually through 2028. This announcem...

item.title: Eric Schmidt Faces Student Backlash During University of Arizona Commencement on AI
item.description: During the University of Arizona's 2026 commencement, former Google CEO Eric Schmidt encountered boos from the audience while discussing the impact of artificial intelligence. Schmidt opened by reflec...

item.title: India expresses concern after drone attack at UAE's Barakah nuclear plant
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs of India has expressed serious concern following Iranian drone strikes targeting the Barakah nuclear power facility in the United Arab Emirates. The attack, described ...

item.title: JM Ibarra talks about his relationship with Fyang Smith and taking things slowly
item.description: JM Ibarra has openly shared that he is currently courting actress Fyang Smith. In a recent interview, he emphasized that he is taking the relationship at a comfortable pace, saying 'Hindi ko minamadal...

item.title: Aaron Rai Becomes First English Winner of the PGA Championship in Over a Century
item.description: Aaron Rai, a 31-year-old golfer from Wolverhampton, made history by winning the 2026 PGA Championship at Aronimink Golf Club, claiming the title for the first time by an Englishman since Jim Barnes in...

item.title: Gbenga Daniel Withdraws from APC Ogun East Senatorial Primary Over Security Concerns
item.description: Senator Gbenga Daniel wey dey represent Ogun East don withdraw from the All Progressives Congress (APC) senatorial primary wey suppose hold on Monday. The former governor talk say e no wan put him sup...

item.title: India and Sweden Elevate Ties to Strategic Partnership with Key Agreements
item.description: On 17th May 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with Swedish Prime Minister Ulf Kristersson in New Delhi, marking a significant step in India-Sweden relations. The discussions were wide-ranging, co...

item.title: Overview of LondonsWay's Earnings and Career as a YouTuber
item.description: LondonsWay, whose real name is Adam Johnson, is a popular American content creator making waves online with his prank videos, challenges, and lifestyle vlogs. Born on 18 June 1997 in Rochester, New Yo...

item.title: Governor Mbah Inspects Major Roads and Infrastructure Projects Ahead of Enugu Inauguration
item.description: Governor Peter Mbah of Enugu State conducted a thorough inspection of several major road and infrastructural projects over the weekend, preparing for their official inauguration in a few weeks. Among ...

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Robert De Niro’s Intense Performance in ‘The Deer Hunter’
item.description: In 1978, Robert De Niro delivered one of the most powerful performances of his career in Michael Cimino's film 'The Deer Hunter.' Portraying Michael Vronsky, a steelworker turned soldier, De Niro full...

item.title: Jannik Sinner Ends 50-Year Drought with Italian Open Victory
item.description: Jannik Sinner made history by becoming the first Italian man in 50 years to win the Italian Open, defeating Casper Ruud 6-4, 6-4 in the final at Rome's Foro Italico. At just 24, Sinner not only claime...

item.title: Queensland Maroons announce 2026 State of Origin squad with Sam Walker and Kalyn Ponga
item.description: Queensland's 2026 State of Origin squad has been announced, featuring several high-profile selections and some notable omissions. Sam Walker of the Roosters has been named at halfback to replace the i...

item.title: All crew members escape safely after Navy jets collide at Idaho air show
item.description: During an air show at Mountain Home Air Force Base in western Idaho on Sunday, two U.S. Navy EA18-G Growler jets from Electronic Attack Squadron 129 collided mid-air during an aerial demonstration. Fo...

item.title: Siyakholwa Kuse dethrones Melvin Jerusalem to claim WBC mini flyweight world title
item.description: In a memorable night for South African boxing at Emperors Palace in Kempton Park on Saturday, Siyakholwa Kuse achieved his dream by winning the prestigious WBC mini flyweight world championship. The E...

item.title: Alleged rhino poaching kingpin Joseph ‘Big Joe’ Nyalungu shot dead in Mpumalanga
item.description: Joseph Nyalungu, better known as ‘Big Joe’, a former police officer from Hazyview and alleged kingpin in Mpumalanga’s rhino poaching syndicates, was shot dead near his business premises in Mkhuhlu on ...
